headline: Philips wins FDA clearance for imaging device developed with Edwards
summary: The system uses AI to optimize the placement of Edwards’ mitral valve repair device.

headline: What to Expect From Edwards Lifesciences' Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Edwards Lifesciences will release its first-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a double-digit bottom-line growth.
